nml_option.name: config_Buttermilk_bay_vert_levels
nml_option.description: Number of vertical levels in Buttermilk bay problem.
nml_option.possible_values: Any positive integer number greater than 1.

nml_option.name: config_Buttermilk_bay_subgrid_table_levels
nml_option.description: Number of levels in suvgrid lookup tables
